description: Led a 3-person team to deliver a working AI indoor navigation system from scratch, shipping a live Vercel demo within 8 weeks. Won 1st Place at Hack@URI AI Track out of 30+ teams. Fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-8B via 3-stage LoRA + GRPO for floorplan-to-navigation-graph generation; deployed YOLOv8 shelf detection (mAP@50 0.893) and EasyOCR aisle sign recognition. Built graph-based pathfinding using NetworkX and Dijkstra's algorithm delivered as a React PWA with real-time map overlays.

company: Northeastern Satellite Lab — CubeSat Star Tracker
description: Designed a centroid-based attitude determination pipeline in Python for Raspberry Pi with INT8 quantization, reducing model size by 75% while meeting strict satellite power constraints. Built a synthetic sky simulator using the 118,000+ star Hipparcos catalog to generate training data across varied sensor noise and orbital conditions, validated across 1,899 ISS-orbit passes.

Built an ArcGIS Pro toolkit using SVM-based land classification and regression-based property valuation across 5+ urban districts, cutting manual climate risk assessment time by ~40%. Applied spatiotemporal clustering to vegetation, heat index, and emergency route data across 3 regions, producing prioritized risk maps adopted by city planning teams.

Engineered ML-based data cleaning pipelines in Python using regression and KNN across 100,000+ records, raising dataset quality from 80% to 95%. Managed CRM workflows and data validation across 10+ major client accounts, contributing to 30% business growth through improved data reliability.

Co-taught Data Visualization (Excel, Power BI) and built an R grading-automation script achieving 98% accuracy and 70% faster grading. Produced 20 Excel/VBA video tutorials for a management training program.

company: BEAR — Behavioural Economics in Action at Rotman
description: Ran statistical analysis in Excel on behavioral experiment data, identifying and resolving bugs that improved dataset accuracy by 70%. Findings directly informed the reevaluation of research hypotheses.
Conducted traffic analysis with Google Analytics to optimize marketing strategy and ad timing. Increased website traffic and event registrations by up to 20% for varsity campaigns.
